task_text: We need to finalize the welcome email to Meridian Group's IT lead. There's a draft in the sandbox — find it, review it, and improve it so it reads as more personalized and professional. Save the improved version back to the same file.

content.content:
budget_vs_actuals_q2.xlsx
client_onboarding_email_draft.txt
helios_api_endpoints.txt

To: Priya Kapoor
Subject: Welcome to the Project Helios Integration Environment

Hi Priya,

We're excited to welcome Meridian Group to the Project Helios integration environment. Project Helios is NovaBridge's data integration platform—designed to streamline ingestion from your ERP system, apply configurable transformation rules, and deliver clean data to your reporting platform via secure APIs and webhooks. Given Meridian's focus on reliable live-data pipelines and a smooth path to UAT, Helios should give your team the visibility, control, and performance you need from day one.

To get started, we'll send your access credentials and onboarding documentation separately within the next 24 hours. In the meantime, a few next steps:

1. Please share Meridian's IT infrastructure diagram for the integration environment setup (as discussed, target by 2026-07-12).
2. Your team will provision UAT environment access by 2026-07-19.
3. We'll aim to resolve remaining setup items ahead of the stakeholder demo on 2026-07-25.

For technical questions, please reach out to Derek Okafor (Technical Lead) at d.okafor@novabridge.com. For project coordination and scheduling, contact Sarah Chen (Project Manager) at s.chen@novabridge.com. Either of us is happy to help.

Please don't hesitate to reach out with any questions—we're looking forward to partnering with you and the Meridian team.

Best regards,
Sarah Chen
Project Manager, NovaBridge
s.chen@novabridge.com

input.content:
To: Priya Kapoor
Subject: Welcome to Project Helios - Integration Environment & Next Steps

Dear Priya,

I hope this email finds you well. 

We are thrilled to welcome you and the Meridian Group team to the Project Helios integration environment. As Meridian's IT Lead, your expertise will be invaluable in ensuring this deployment is a success. Project Helios is NovaBridge's premier data integration platform, specifically tailored to streamline data ingestion from your ERP system, apply configurable transformation rules, and securely deliver pristine data to your reporting platforms via APIs and webhooks. 

Understanding Meridian's strategic focus on reliable, live-data pipelines and a seamless path to UAT, we are confident that Helios will equip your team with the visibility, control, and performance required from day one.

To initiate the onboarding process, we will send your secure access credentials and comprehensive documentation in a separate email within the next 24 hours. In the meantime, here are a few immediate next steps to keep our timeline on track:

1. Infrastructure Diagram: Please share Meridian's IT infrastructure diagram to help us finalize the integration environment setup (target date: July 12, 2026).
2. UAT Access: We ask that your team provisions the UAT environment access (target date: July 19, 2026).
3. Stakeholder Demo: We aim to resolve all remaining setup items ahead of our joint stakeholder demo scheduled for July 25, 2026.

For any technical inquiries, please feel free to reach out to Derek Okafor, our Technical Lead, at d.okafor@novabridge.com. For project coordination, scheduling, or general questions, I will be your primary point of contact. 

Please do not hesitate to reach out if you need anything at all. We are genuinely looking forward to a highly successful partnership with you and the entire Meridian IT team.

Warm regards,

Sarah Chen
Project Manager, NovaBridge
s.chen@novabridge.com

content.text:
I have found the draft `client_onboarding_email_draft.txt` in the sandbox, reviewed it, and rewritten it to be more personalized and professional. 

The revised email now formally addresses Priya as Meridian's IT Lead, adopts a warmer yet more polished professional tone, and formats the next steps for better readability while retaining all the essential technical details and deadlines. 

The updated draft has been saved back to the same file. Feel free to review it to ensure it perfectly aligns with your expectations!
